creator: odip@bionet.nsc.ru
text:
There are nice log analizer for squid. It is sqmgrlog.

Sqmgrlog is a Squid Analisys Report Generator that allow you to view
 "where" your users are going to on the Internet.
Sqmgrlog generate reports in html, with many fields, like: users,
 IP Addresses, bytes, sites and times.

WWW: http://web.onda.com.br/orso/sqmgrlog.html

Fix: Unpack follow uuencoded file into ports/www/
Build and install port of sqmgrlog
